overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character carrying an injured companion through a rainy, post-apocalyptic urban environment. The pair navigates through overgrown backyards, wooded paths, shipping container corridors, and muddy abandoned streets before reaching a shelter. The atmosphere is dark and tense with heavy rainfall and low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown backyard between abandoned brick buildings

agents.ego_description: carrying an injured person on her shoulder through tall grass and weeds behind abandoned buildings

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with broken windows and fire escape
weathered wooden privacy fence with overgrowth
tall unkempt grass covering the ground
abandoned vehicle partially visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, rainy backyard area between abandoned buildings. The character moves through tall grass with a brick building on the right and a wooden fence on the left. The atmosphere is tense and quiet with heavy rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded path with overhead wooden beam structure

events.description: moves from open grassy backyard into tree-covered path with overhead wooden support beams

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the wooden structure through the densely wooded area

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a canopy overhead
thick wooden beams and planks forming a partial roof structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow wooded path sheltered by large trees and an overhead wooden structure. The ground becomes a dirt trail and the dense foliage provides some cover from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between stacked shipping containers

events.description: enters tight passage between tall shipping containers with wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: navigating the confined corridor between rusted shipping containers

entered.detail: stacked rusted metal shipping containers forming walls on both sides
elevated wooden planks forming a path through the container corridor

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an industrial corridor formed by stacked shipping containers. The wooden walkway elevates the path slightly, and graffiti is visible on the container walls. The space is tight and claustrophobic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy yard in abandoned residential area with distant tower

events.description: exits container corridor into open muddy area with abandoned houses and distant structures

agents.ego_description: walking across the muddy ground toward a distant building with a tower visible in the background

entered.detail: single-story abandoned house with boarded windows
tall industrial tower or crane structure visible through the rain
wet muddy ground with puddles reflecting the dim light
derelict vehicle parked near the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the container passage, the scene opens into a wide muddy yard between abandoned houses. Rain falls heavily on the wet ground, and a tall industrial tower looms in the distant fog. The character continues toward a building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: porch entrance of abandoned house with guard

events.description: approaches the shelter building entrance with stairs and porch
ascends the metal stairs and enters the building doorway

agents.ego_description: carrying the injured person up the stairs and into the shelter where a guard stands watch on the porch

notable_agents.action: standing guard on the porch near the entrance, watching the approaching character

entered.detail: covered porch area with metal railings and overhead awning
metal staircase leading up to the entrance door
open doorway leading into the dark interior

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a shelter building. A guard stands watch on the right side of the porch as the character carries her companion up the metal stairs and through the doorway into the dark interior, escaping the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban wasteland that shifts from an open backyard into a claustrophobic industrial corridor. It begins in a dark, rain-soaked backyard, moving through tall grass between a brick building and a wooden fence under a heavy downpour. As the character advances, the scene transitions into a narrow wooded path where large trees and an overhead wooden structure provide shelter and the ground turns to a dirt trail. The environment then shifts from the dense foliage into a tight industrial corridor formed by stacked shipping containers. Finally, the path elevates onto a wooden walkway, passing graffiti-covered walls in a space that feels increasingly enclosed.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, rain-soaked yard toward the sanctuary of a sheltered building. It begins as the camera emerges from a container passage into a wide, muddy expanse between abandoned houses, where heavy rain falls under the shadow of a distant industrial tower looming in the fog. As the character pushes forward through the wet terrain, the scene shifts focus toward a building on the right. The camera then follows the ascent up metal stairs, passing a guard standing watch on the porch before finally crossing the threshold into a dark interior, leaving the storm behind.
